context: Tests whether the agent corrects stale SwiftUI gesture API and availability claims using official Apple/Sosumi sources.

checklist.name: MagnifyGesture modernization
checklist.description: Recommends MagnifyGesture instead of MagnificationGesture for iOS 17+ pinch/magnification work.

checklist.name: RotateGesture modernization
checklist.description: Recommends RotateGesture instead of RotationGesture for iOS 17+ rotation work.

checklist.name: Drag velocity availability
checklist.description: Does not claim DragGesture.Value.velocity is iOS 17-only; identifies it as available on the same iOS 13+ baseline as DragGesture.Value.

checklist.name: UIKit gesture interop availability
checklist.description: Identifies UIGestureRecognizerRepresentable as iOS 18+ and limits it to UIKit gesture recognizer interop.

checklist.name: Official source grounding
checklist.description: Uses Sosumi or official Apple documentation URLs when citing Apple API availability.
